title: Comment on "Search for new particles decaying into electron pairs of mass below 100 MeV/c^2"
abstract: A re-analysis of data from electron-pair production following 160 A GeV 207Pb bombardment of nuclear emulsions indicates the production and decay of neutral particles of significantly lower invariant mass and shorter lifetimes than previously claimed (J. Phys. G: Nucl. Part. Phys. 34 (2007) 129-138).
